Founder of Wedding Candid

Deep Mistry

Photos / Director / Storyteller

"Relationships change in due period of time,
The only constant is the memories you captured in photographs"

Founder of : WEDDING CANDID

EST. 2015

Deep Mistry is a professional Photographer / Cinematographer renowned for his creative imagery and profound storytelling abilities.

"As an artist whose medium of bringing the art to the world is an intent of compartmentalising the moments, I am all about things which are not seen by the naked eye but a soul which feels what cannot be said through any other medium."

With a passion for capturing life's most cherished moments, he has carved a niche for himself in the world of photography over the last 9 years. As the founder of WEDDING CANDID, he has elevated the art of Wedding photography, transforming emotional moments into timeless treasures.

He has redefined the essence of Wedding photography. His distinctive eye for grabbing the ongoing moment results in stunning visual narratives that resonate deeply with his clients. Each wedding captured by him enables the client to cherish every event even years after its passing, weaving a rich tapestry of emotions, relationships, and memories.

I am a professional wedding photographer and filmmaker who has spent the last nine years doing one thing — being fully present at the most important day of your life.

My work is not about perfect poses or manufactured smiles. It is about the split-second glance between a father and his daughter before she walks down the aisle. The private laugh only the two of you share. The quiet exhale of a bride the moment everything becomes real. Those are the moments I live for — and the ones I will carry back to you, forever.

As the founder of Wedding Candid, I have built a practice rooted in trust, emotion, and craft. Every frame I deliver is a piece of your story — not mine.

The Moment Everything Changed

My first wedding
taught me what
this really means.

The moment I shot my first wedding, I felt the weight of it. These were not clients — they were people placing one of the most precious days of their lives in my hands. They trusted me completely. That trust changed how I approach every single wedding I photograph.

I realised that the skills I had been sharpening for years were not just about beautiful photos. They carried real weight — the responsibility to preserve what can never be recreated, and to return it as a memory that grows richer with every passing year.

Every time I pick up my camera, I feel that same quiet responsibility. And I would not have it any other way.

9 Years of weddings,
each one irreplaceable

How I work

I don't direct. I don't interrupt.
I simply show up — and let your
story unfold in front of me.

I

Invisible Presence

You will feel completely at ease on your wedding day. My camera becomes part of the atmosphere, not a disruption to it.

II

Emotional Storytelling

Every gallery I deliver tells the full arc of your day — from the nervous morning preparations to the last dance of the night.

III

Lasting Craft

These photographs will outlive us. I treat them with the seriousness that deserves — every image deliberately made, never accidental.

2015 → Now

The Journey

A Heritage
Built on Commitment

I first picked up a camera in 2017 and bought my own in 2018. I spent months assisting on shoots, learning the craft from the ground up — from production sets to family portraits to smaller celebrations.

One night, I made the decision to commit fully. I threw everything I had into building Wedding Candid — not just as a business, but as a promise to every couple who would ever trust me with their story.

Beyond the lens

My goals are simple.
But they're big.

01

Grow Wedding Candid and let photography take my family all over the world.

02

Be the best husband and father — every single day, without compromise.

03

Own a studio space that becomes a blessing to other creatives in this city.

04

Keep showing up for my friends — and collect plenty more tattoos along the way.

A note from Deep

Thank you for taking the time to read my story. I know you have many choices when it comes to your wedding photographer — and I don't take it lightly when someone stops to genuinely connect with what I do. It means more than I can say.

If you are here, you are looking for someone who will care about your day as much as you do. I promise you — I will. I am excited for the chance to meet you, hear your story, and hopefully create something together that you will treasure for the rest of your lives.

— Deep Mistry Wedding Candid

Let's tell your story
together.

Every great wedding starts with a conversation.

Begin Your Story

Dedicated to the quiet moments, the unspoken glances, and the light that defines us. Minimalist luxury photography for those who value authenticity.
